article_title: Booking.com Confirms Data Breach Exposing Reservation Details for Unknown Number of Travelers as Phishing Risks Mount

content_preview.title: Booking.com Confirms Data Breach Exposing Reservation Details for Unknown Number of Travelers as Phishing Risks Mount
content_preview.summary: Booking.com confirmed hackers accessed customer names, contact details, and reservation data, forcing PIN resets across the platform while declining to disclose how many users were affected.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Booking.com, the world's largest online travel platform, confirmed over the weekend that hackers gained unauthorized access to customer reservation data, exposing names, contact information, and booking details for an undisclosed number of travelers. The company has forced PIN resets on affected reservations and begun notifying impacted users, but has declined to reveal how the breach occurred or how many customers are affected.
